title: Add admin user management and email/password authentication with biometric support

requirements.text: Create a new admin user management system in the backend that allows existing admins to invite and share website access with other partners. Store invited admin users with fields for email, hashed password, biometric registration status, invitation status (pending/accepted), invited by (admin principal), and invitation timestamp.

quotes: admin can share the website acsess other partners also

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores admin user records with email, password hash, and biometric status
Existing admins can create invitation records for new admin partners
Invitation system tracks who invited whom and when
Admin list is queryable by authenticated admins

requirements.text: Implement email and password authentication for admin users in the backend. Support password hashing for secure storage, password verification on login attempts, and return authentication tokens or principals on successful authentication. This authentication method should work alongside the existing Internet Identity authentication.

quotes: he only can accsess login with email password

acceptanceCriteria: Backend function to register admin with email and password
Passwords are hashed before storage
Backend function to authenticate admin by email and password
Authentication tokens or principals are returned on successful login
Email/password auth coexists with Internet Identity auth

requirements.text: Add biometric authentication registration and verification capability in the backend. Store biometric template data or registration status for admin users who enable biometric login. Provide backend functions to register biometric credentials and verify biometric authentication attempts.

quotes: if have admin can use his face lock

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores biometric registration status for each admin
Backend function to register biometric credentials for an admin
Backend function to verify biometric authentication attempts
Biometric auth can be used as an alternative login method

requirements.text: Create an admin-only login page that is only visible and accessible to admin users. This page should provide login options for email/password authentication and biometric authentication. Display a login form with email and password fields, and include a biometric login button that triggers device-level biometric verification.

quotes: make a login option only can visible to admin
he only can accsess login with email password and baio metrics

acceptanceCriteria: Admin login page is created and only accessible via admin routes
Page displays email and password input fields
Page includes a biometric login button
Login form submission calls backend authentication
Successful login redirects to admin dashboard

requirements.text: Create an admin user management interface page where authenticated admins can view the list of all admin users, invite new admin partners by email, and manage admin access. Display admin users with their email, invitation status, and invitation date. Provide a form to send new admin invitations.

quotes: admin can share the website acsess other partners also

acceptanceCriteria: Admin user management page displays all admin users in a table or list
Each admin entry shows email, status, and invitation details
Form to invite new admin by email address
Invitation submission calls backend to create new admin invitation
Success/error feedback is displayed to the user

requirements.text: Implement frontend biometric authentication flow using the Web Authentication API (WebAuthn). When the biometric login button is clicked, initiate device-level biometric verification (fingerprint, Face ID, Touch ID) and send verification results to the backend for authentication. Handle browser compatibility and provide appropriate error messages if biometric hardware is not available.

quotes: admin can use his face lock

acceptanceCriteria: Biometric login button triggers WebAuthn authentication flow
Device-level biometric prompt is displayed to user
Authentication result is sent to backend for verification
Successful biometric auth grants admin access
Error handling for unsupported browsers or hardware

requirements.text: Update the Layout component and admin navigation to hide the existing Internet Identity login button from regular admin pages and replace it with a link to the new admin-only email/password/biometric login page. Ensure the new login option is only visible on admin routes.

quotes: make a login option only can visible to admin

acceptanceCriteria: Internet Identity login button is hidden on admin pages
New admin login link is displayed only on admin routes
Login link navigates to the new admin login page
Regular customer pages remain unaffected

constraints: Do not remove or disable the existing Internet Identity authentication system
Email/password authentication must coexist with Internet Identity authentication
Biometric authentication must use device-level hardware (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint sensors)
Password storage must use secure hashing algorithms
Admin user management must be protected and only accessible to authenticated admins
nonGoals: Implementing two-factor authentication (2FA) or OTP verification
Creating a password reset flow via email
Building a complete identity provider or SSO system
Implementing role-based permissions beyond admin/non-admin distinction
